channel.title: Posts on António Sousa
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on António Sousa

item.title: GTDB and RefSeq-RDP DBs parsed for the addSpecies() dada2 function
item.description: GTDB and RefSeq-RDP databases parsed for the addSpecies() dada2 function. Both databases were parsed with parsing_DB_dada2_spp_assign.py python script using as input both databases downloaded at: https://zenodo.org/record/2541239#.XM2UgCOZPOQ. The python script and a detailed description explaining the code and databases versions can be found at: Tutorial on GitHub Zenodo repository for download
